reviews.review_msg: Dr. Griffiths is a FANTASTIC professor! Hes top tier and a chill professor. He knows what hes talking about. When he does talk, youll never get bored since theres always something new to learn from him. Despite the many brief papers, you get a lot of value from the readings. His guest speakers add to the wonderful class experience as well.

Curt is an amazing professor & the course was enjoyable. A large part of your mark is participation so you need to come to class and contribute. There were 5 essay's, so quite a bit of reading for each of these because you need to reference the different articles. He is a completely fair marker and the guest speakers were very knowledgeable.

He is one of the best professor I ever had in my university life. His course is designed full of eye-opening and impressive contents that you can't get from other courses. He is very caring. Saying good morning to individual students is not a major thing nor related to the course, but certainly makes you feel welcomed.
She gave me so much great feedback. Highly recommend.
She really cares about her students. Gives great feedback and marks fairly.
Hilary is an amazing instructor. She goes so far above and beyond for her students. I would take another class with her any time.
Super hard marker on papers & online presentation which weigh heavily on your marks . Avoid at all costs !
Worst prof in my opinion. Wouldn't take again. Assignments aren't clear and she grades too hard.

She forces you to learn which is fantastic. She is super nice and approachable and always willing to help. BUT she gives out SO MANY assignments and for the amount of work they cause they are not worth the percentage weight in which they are assigned. Wouldn't take again because of the work load.
Is currently being investigated for sexual misconduct with his students. Allegation involve grooming, and coercion.

Sticky situation. Easy prof,ood lectures, got a good grade, but honestly - ethically prob not okay to be teaching this class. So biased. We paid tuition to have a VPD recruiter take up one of our lectures.
